betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6The Crucible§f is a multiblock smelting structure for §bhigh-temperature metallurgy§f.

§eCapabilities:§f
• Melts materials into §bmolten forms§f
• Casting and alloying operations
• Essential for advanced metalworking

§eOperation:§f
• Feed solid materials into crucible
• Apply heat to melt
• Pour molten metal into molds or transfer to other systems

§eUses:§f
• Creating exotic alloys
• Processing high-temperature materials
• Advanced metal casting

§aTip:§f The Crucible is essential for end-game metalworking where standard furnaces won't suffice.
